name: lookback_boundary_exactly_15
description: Exactly 15 days of OHLC. This is the minimum that satisfies the documented short-circuit (len(valid_dates) < 15 -> fallback). 15 days yields exactly 14 TR samples (day 0 has no prev close). Uses the same linear_trend regime as fixture 02 so the expected value matches.
derivation: Same construction as fixture 02 -- 15 days is the boundary that exactly produces 14 TR samples. avg_tr = 2, recent_close = 114, atr_pct = 200/114 = 100/57 = 1.7543859649122806...
